user.title: Connect Sony camera
user.description: Make sure 'Bluetooth Rmt Ctrl' is enabled in the camera's menu (Menu > Network > Bluetooth) and the camera is awake, then pick it below.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Sony camera discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

pair.title: Pair with {name}
pair.description:
Home Assistant will now pair (bond) with the camera over Bluetooth. No PIN is needed. Keep the camera turned on and nearby, then press Submit.

{error}

error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. See the message above for details.
error.not_found: The camera is no longer visible over Bluetooth. Make sure it is turned on and in range, then try again.
